description: Union Dataplane health and service metrics

panels.title: Service Availability
panels.description: Percentage of deployments with all requested replicas available. 1.0 = all healthy.

panels.title: Pod Restarts (1h)
panels.description: Total container restarts in the last hour. Non-zero indicates crashlooping or OOM kills.

panels.title: Active Workflows
panels.description: Current active FlyteWorkflow CRD count managed by Propeller.

panels.title: Active Executions
panels.description: Current count of active workflow, node, and task executions tracked by FlyteAdmin.

panels.title: Queue Depth
panels.description: Main and sub workqueue depth over time.

panels.title: Handler Panics
panels.description: Total handler panics in DP services. Any non-zero value indicates a service caught a panic during request handling.

panels.title: Service Availability
panels.description: Current service availability across all DP deployments.

panels.title: Error Budget Remaining
panels.description: Fraction of error budget remaining. Requires monitoring.slos.enabled.

panels.title: Execution Success Rate

targets.expr: union:dp:slo:execution_success_rate or (union:dp:slo:propeller_success_rate + union:dp:slo:executor_success_rate) / 2 or union:dp:slo:propeller_success_rate or vector(1)

panels.description: Combined V1 (propeller) and V2 (executor) task success rate. Falls back to propeller-only or 100% when idle.

panels.title: Propeller Latency p99
panels.description: Propeller round p99 latency in seconds. Falls back to raw metric if SLO rules not enabled.

panels.title: Availability Over Time
panels.description: DP service availability over time with SLO target line.

panels.title: Error Budget Burn Rate
panels.description: DP error budget remaining over time. Requires monitoring.slos.enabled.

panels.title: Work Queue Operations
panels.description: Operator execution operation processing rate and failure rate.

panels.title: Background Process Runs / Errors
panels.description: FlyteAdmin error rates: propeller communication failures, model transform errors, notification publish failures.

panels.title: Heartbeat Latency
panels.description: Breakdown of operator heartbeat computation: capabilities, usages, list workflows.

panels.title: Config Syncer
panels.description: Config sync cycle rate, errors, and propeller ConfigMap update count.

panels.title: Billable Usage Collector
panels.description: Billing collection cycle rate and errors. Failures mean billing data may be delayed.

panels.title: Work Queue Paused
panels.description: 1 when operator paused due to resource limits (FlyteWorkflow count or storage exceeded).

panels.title: Active Actions & Capacity
panels.description: V2 executor active actions vs available capacity. Capacity=0 means executor is saturated.

panels.title: Cache Discovery
panels.description: V2 executor cache discovery miss/put rates for task output caching.

panels.title: Actions Terminated by Phase
panels.description: Task completion rate by outcome: succeeded, failed, aborted. Key V2 SLI for task health. [Metrics pending: requires cloud service instrumentation to be deployed]

panels.title: Evaluator Duration (pod creation)
panels.description: Time spent in RecursiveNodeHandler (pod creation). Dominant component of V2 task latency. [Metrics pending: requires cloud service instrumentation to be deployed]

panels.title: System Failures & Invalid Leases
panels.description: Executor error rates. System failures retry; exhausted means task permanently failed. Invalid leases = malformed from queue service. [Metrics pending: requires cloud service instrumentation to be deployed]

panels.title: Round Time (p50 / p90 / p99)
panels.description: Propeller reconciliation round time. One round = one FlyteWorkflow CRD processed.

panels.title: Round Success / Error Rate
panels.description: Propeller round outcomes: success, errors, and panics per second.

panels.title: Free Workers
panels.description: Idle propeller worker goroutines. Zero = all workers busy processing workflows.

panels.title: Queue Add Rate
panels.description: Items enqueued to propeller's main/sub workqueues, plus retry rate.

panels.title: Workflow Updates
panels.description: etcd write outcomes: successful updates, failures, too-large (>1.5MB), optimistic concurrency conflicts.

panels.title: Workflow Update Latency
panels.description: etcd write latency for FlyteWorkflow status updates.

panels.title: Node Queueing & Execution Latency
panels.description: Node lifecycle: queueing latency (queued→running) and execution latency (time in handler).

panels.title: Metastore Cache Hit Rate
panels.description: In-memory cache effectiveness for object store (S3/GCS) reads. Low hit rate = excessive storage calls.

panels.title: Event Recording (DP → CP)
panels.description: Task/node event recording rate from propeller to FlyteAdmin. Failures indicate CP connectivity issues.

panels.title: Cache Discovery (hit/miss/skip)
panels.description: V2 executor cache discovery miss/put rates for task output caching.

panels.title: K8s API Client Rate
panels.description: Propeller's K8s API request rate. High rates may indicate excessive pod watches or creates.

panels.title: K8s API Client Latency (p90)
panels.description: K8s API request latency and client-side rate limiter wait time at p90.

panels.title: gRPC Client Request Rate
panels.description: DP→CP gRPC client request rate by service and method (e.g. CreateWorkflowEvent).

panels.title: gRPC Client Error Rate
panels.description: DP→CP gRPC errors by method and code. Non-OK responses from the control plane.

panels.title: gRPC Client Latency (p95)
panels.description: DP→CP gRPC call latency at p95. High latency = slow control plane or network issues.

panels.title: CPU Usage by Service
panels.description: CPU usage in cores per container, stacked. Identifies resource-heavy services.

panels.title: Memory Usage by Service
panels.description: Working set memory per container, stacked. Watch for approaching limits.

panels.title: Pod Restart Count by Container
panels.description: Per-container restart events. Spikes indicate crashes or OOM kills.

title: Union Dataplane Overview
